stories.title: Arkansas/Florida Rubber Match — Series Tied, Winner-Take-All Today

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Game 3. TODAY. Bogle Park.

Arkansas beat Florida 6-2 in Game 1. Florida fired back 12-6 in Game 2.

Now it's winner-take-all at 1 PM CT — and Arkansas has won 8 of the last 10 against the Gators since 2022. 🥎

#WPS #GoGators #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The power shift in college softball is REAL.

Arkansas owns a 8-of-10 series advantage over Florida since 2022.

No. 3 Florida has to EARN this rubber match today. Bogle Park doesn't care about rankings.

#WPS #GoGators #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Winner-Take-All: Arkansas and Florida Meet in Game 3 After Wild Series Split

stories.title: Ole Miss 2, Tennessee 1 — Boyer's Complete Game Stuns No. 4 Vols

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Ole Miss 2, Tennessee 1.

Emilee Boyer went the distance — complete game, 132 pitches. Kennedy Bunker's solo homer was all the Rebels needed.

No. 4 Tennessee drops to 6-3 in SEC play. The Vols' postseason case just got complicated. 🥎

#VolsSoftball #SECSoftball #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Ole Miss is 0-9 in the SEC.

They just beat No. 4 Tennessee.

That's not an upset. That's a statement about Tennessee's offense. Boyer dealt, Bunker delivered, and the Vols couldn't answer.

6-3 SEC. The title window is narrowing.

#VolsSoftball #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Texas 3, A&M 2 — Streak at 29, Atwood HR Clinches Series

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Texas 3, Texas A&M 2.

Reese Atwood with the homer. Win streak to 29. Series clinched 2-0.

31-1 overall. 8-0 in SEC. Still No. 1.

Game 3 is today — Texas is going for THIRTY in a row. 🔥

#HookEm #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: LSU 3, Oklahoma 1 — Game 2 Snaps OU's Perfect SEC Record, Game 3 Today

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
LSU 3, Oklahoma 1.

The Sooners' perfect SEC record is gone. Tiger Park showed up and the Tigers evened the series.

No Kendall Wells HR in Game 2. But Game 3 is TODAY — and you know she's locked in.

#BoomerSooner #GeauxTigers #NCAASoftball

stories.title: Kendall Wells at 25 HRs — Tied SEC Freshman Record, 5 From All-Time Mark

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells has 25 home runs.

That's the SEC freshman record. Tied. As a true freshman. Still in March.

The all-time freshman record is 30 (Alo/Chamberlain/Majam). She needs FIVE more.

With 20+ games left, the record is hers to lose. 👀

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball #Softball

article.headline: 25 and Counting: Kendall Wells Ties the SEC Freshman Home Run Record

stories.title: Erin Nuwer — 3rd Career No-Hitter, Tennessee's Pitching Depth Is Elite

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Erin Nuwer just threw her 3rd career no-hitter.

She's a SOPHOMORE.

Pickens. Mardjetko. Nuwer. Tennessee's rotation is as deep as any in the country.

The offense needs to catch up. 🥎

#VolsSoftball #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball
